recommendations.title: The Pimp
recommendations.overview: A mild-mannered banker is forced to masquerade as a notorious gangster and pimp.

recommendations.title: Saw: Rebirth
recommendations.overview: This animated comic goes back in time to explore the events that spurred the transformation of mild-mannered John Kramer into the monstrous Jigsaw.

recommendations.title: Ikarie XB 1
recommendations.overview: The year is 2163. Starship Ikaria XB 1 embarks on a mission deep into space in search of alien life.  During their perilous journey the crew confront the effects of a malignant dark star, the destructive legacy of the 20th century and, ultimately, th

recommendations.title: Baaghi 3
recommendations.overview: A man embarks on a bloody rampage to save his kidnapped brother.

recommendations.title: Meet Bill
recommendations.overview: A mild-mannered bank executive mentors a teenage con artist and tries to make a career change as a doughnut merchant.

recommendations.title: Death Wish
recommendations.overview: A mild-mannered father is transformed into a killing machine after his family is torn apart by a violent act.

recommendations.title: Double World
recommendations.overview: Keen to bring honor to his clan, young villager Dong Yilong embarks on a perilous journey to compete in a tournament that selects warriors for battle.

recommendations.title: Miami Blues
recommendations.overview: After Junior is released from prison, he plans on starting a new life in Miami. But when he kills a man in the airport, he flees the scene and finds Susie, a mild-mannered prostitute searching for stability. The two opposites become romantically invo

recommendations.title: Beau Is Afraid
recommendations.overview: Following the sudden death of his mother, a mild-mannered but anxiety-ridden man confronts his darkest fears as he embarks on an epic odyssey back home.

recommendations.title: Emancipation
recommendations.overview: Inspired by the gripping true story of a man who would do anything for his family—and for freedom. When Peter, an enslaved man, risks his life to escape and return to his family, he embarks on a perilous journey of love and endurance.
